-1.3361*(0.0069*exp(1.9296*x_2) + 0.0045*sin(2.389*x_1 + 0.5974) - 1)**2 - 2.4336*exp(0.0114*sinh(0.8013 - 1.7066*x_2) + 0.0335*tanh(1.5817*x_1 - 2.4648)) + 3.1297
